name: Yao Sheng Electronic Co., Ltd.
summary: Yao Sheng Electronic Co., Ltd. designs, produces, and sells transformers and inductors in Taiwan and internationally. It offers low frequency, LLC, flyback, LED, and flat wire transformers; and standard reactors. The company also provides FT, T, UU, and ET series common mode chokes; iron, DR, and R core chokes, as well as PFC and high current chokes. Its products are used in LCD monitors and TVs, cell phones, personal computers, TVs, and information appliances. Yao Sheng Electronic Co., Ltd. was founded in 1992 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
